scripts.build: python3 -m compileall -q scripts/dashboard_web && node --check scripts/dashboard_web/app.js && node --check scripts/dashboard_web/live-system.js
scripts.test: python3 -m pytest -q scripts/dashboard_web/tests && bash tests/test-project-audit.sh && bash tests/test-dashboard-db-repair.sh && bash tests/test-token-usage-normalize.sh
scripts.lint: python3 -m compileall -q scripts/dashboard_web && python3 -c "from scripts.dashboard_web.middleware import validate_queries_on_boot; passed, failed, _ = validate_queries_on_boot(); raise SystemExit(0 if failed == 0 else 1)"
